title: A New Challenger Has Appeared 31s New Evas
display_title: A New Challenger Has Appeared 31s New Evas
wikitext:
[]: A New Challenger Has Appeared! (3+1's New Eva(s))             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Aug 05, 2020 9:18 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Another year, another Anno Evangelion Mark.10(!!!) tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]: Re: Lamp Festival with Anno drawings             Quote Post by Velorex » Wed Aug 05, 2020 9:50 pm welp its a mark 10 with a X-ten for a face...

[]: Re: Lamp Festival with Anno drawings             Quote Post by girlifyoudidnt » Wed Aug 05, 2020 10:01 pm Official clean scan (with a watermark though) tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]: Re: Lamp Festival with Anno drawings             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Wed Aug 05, 2020 10:09 pm Hot! I wonder who the pilot could be? A captured Rei Q? A new Rei clone? Or will it be full automated?

[]: Re: Lamp Festival with Anno drawings             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Aug 05, 2020 10:22 pm Oh yeah, a fan on Twitter pointed this out. (Kamen Rider or Ultraman, I forget?) tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]: Re: Lamp Festival with Anno drawings             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Aug 05, 2020 10:23 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: I wonder who the pilot could be? A captured Rei Q? A new Rei clone?

[]: Re: Lamp Festival with Anno drawings             Quote Post by Velorex » Wed Aug 05, 2020 10:24 pm tbh it reminds me of AnimA SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Lamp Festival with Anno drawings             Quote Post by Tajai » Wed Aug 05, 2020 10:34 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: Hot! I wonder who the pilot could be? A captured Rei Q? A new Rei clone? Or will it be full automated?

[]: Re: Lamp Festival with Anno drawings             Quote Post by Velorex » Wed Aug 05, 2020 10:43 pm also it looks like it has an angel's face, a Seele logo on the forhead, and the X/roman numeral

[]: Re: Lamp Festival with Anno drawings             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Aug 05, 2020 10:53 pm Good call on the Angel face. The Seele logo also forms a third eye. Angel face + third eye calls back to Eva-01 from Near Third Impact, suggesting that maybe Mark.10 is the Vessel for Eva-01's original core. (I had guessed this previously, on the basis that "10" is "01" inverted, so if Anno was going to play with numbers that seemed like an obvious way to go.) I guess in a way the "X" also plays in N3I Eva-01, since she opens a big X-shaped rift in the ground. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Lamp Festival with Anno drawings             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Wed Aug 05, 2020 11:17 pm So what color are we thinking for Mark 10, eh? Since Unit 00 never got a repaint the Rebuilds have not yet gone with a Blue Eva. Or maybe a full neon green if it acts as commander to the greenish MP Evas. I'd also be up for tie-dye but I don't think they're gonna go with that.

[]: Re: Lamp Festival with Anno drawings             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Aug 05, 2020 11:36 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: Since Unit 00 never got a repaint the Rebuilds have not yet gone with a Blue Eva.

[]: Re: Lamp Festival with Anno drawings             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Wed Aug 05, 2020 11:57 pm Shit.... I completely forgot about Mark 6! Ok, time for bed! I’m definitely sleep deprived

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by Zoop » Thu Aug 06, 2020 3:13 am Cool, Evangelion X I'm wondering if this means we'll get a flashback featuring it, or if it will be more like Eva 04 (only talked about, but designed to sell models). Edit: Wrong place for this, replies in thread/20220/the-questions-that-MUST-be-answered/ or post/896241/Lamp-Festival-with-Anno-drawings/#896241

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Aug 06, 2020 4:34 am Zoop wrote: I'm wondering if this means we'll get a flashback featuring it, or if it will be more like Eva 04 (only talked about, but designed to sell models).

[]: Re: Lamp Festival with Anno drawings             Quote Post by Zoop » Thu Aug 06, 2020 5:07 am Hmm good point, up till now I assumed MK10 would have been a past Eva, since it went from 09 to 13 (meaning, a missing 10, 11 and 12), and thus something from during the timeskip. I don't think they'll linger too much on what happened before, hence why i thought it would be treated like eva04. But those three perhaps being involved in the final fight would make a lot more sense, especially if you are right about them being similar to 09, being vessels. I don't really buy that its supposed to be a mirror to 01 tho (not yet anyway, maybe have to let this sink), as 13 already did that. But then again, 09 turned out really differently (colors, and its head looking more like Wunder), and 13 also went through a big change ... so who knows. Starting out looking like a Power Ranger, but when it "awakens" starts to look like a dark version of 01 ... hmmm ... In any case, it would be totally awesome if 01 made its comeback by ripping itself out of Wunder

[]: Re: Lamp Festival with Anno drawings             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Aug 06, 2020 5:54 am Anno getting his Kamen Rider on for Shin Eva is the dorkiest thing he's done professionally since live-action Cutie Honey and I love it! I can't wait for Mark.10 to terrify my very soul despite all that.

[]: Re: Lamp Festival with Anno drawings             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Aug 06, 2020 6:16 am @Zoop: One "mirror" does not discount the existence of another. It was bluntly apparent that Mark.06 was a shadowy counterpart to Eva-01 as soon as it appeared, but this didn't prevent Eva-13 from existing, did it? Eva has always been a giant house of mirrors. They're everywhere. Mk.10 is specifically referencing Eva-01's appearance as a Radiant Giant, which has never been done before, and makes sense if it's Eva-01's Vessel and is made of its original (non-Lilith) core.

[]: Re: Lamp Festival with Anno drawings             Quote Post by Velorex » Thu Aug 06, 2020 2:25 pm I bet the X is actually wires wrapped around the mask in a similar way seen with the mk.44

[]: Re: Lamp Festival with Anno drawings             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Thu Aug 06, 2020 2:33 pm Ok... Assuming we'll get to see Marks 10-12 the question of what happened to Eva 07 remains... Was it a Mark unit? A Production Model like Eva 08?
